'''''Tory's Catcher''''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 cruiser]].

==History==
Under the command of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Gresia Vleen]], the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 cruiser]] ''Tory's Catcher'' patrolled the [[Noonian sector/Legends|Noonian sector]].<ref name="air">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''</ref>

At some point before [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]], the ''Tory's Catcher'' captured [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] [[Thi Sawrtin]] and [[Zayl Braith]], who were performing a "rutinary" smuggling run through Noonian sector. Sawrtin tried to bribe Vleen, which led Vleen to shoot Sawrtin. Then, Vleen impounded Sawrtin's [[Starship/Legends|ship]] and convinced Braith to serve a sentence on [[Rol Two|Rol II]].<ref name="air" />
